sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111438" key="filopto/lemos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλοπτόλεμος</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλόπτολις</orth>, poet. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">φιλοπόλεμος, φιλόπολις.</foreign> </entryFree>
